drop_in_revenue_mix_share.rationale: Base centered on plan commitment of 25%. Premortem and Expert Criticism flag the off-peak rental stream as speculative; low-side reflects the 60%-of-target risk passage, high capped near the source's stated target.

minimum_viable_hourly_rate_dkk.rationale: Plan states 165 DKK/hr as the minimum viable rate but Expert Criticism documents a 50 DKK/hr Local Co-op fallback when uptake fails; high side allows a modest tourist premium.

labor_law_shock_cost_share.rationale: Review Plan Issue 3 forecasts a 20-35% fixed-labor cost increase if contractor classification is rejected. Low side at zero represents the compliant outcome; base at the 20-35% midpoint; high at the upper named bound.

year1_revenue_target_dkk.rationale: Source provides no explicit Year 1 revenue target; base anchored at the 2M DKK budget envelope as a working break-even proxy. Spread ±30% reflects high uncertainty noted in the Missing-data items.

monthly_fte_cost_dkk.rationale: Greenlandic skilled-instructor pay benchmark; base near 38k DKK/month consistent with Nordic part-time art-instructor rates. Spread reflects the contractor/salaried classification uncertainty named in Review Issue 3.

months_in_year1.rationale: Base 12 months for full Year 1 operation. Low side at 9 reflects the September 2026 readiness target slipping into Q4, shortening operational year as flagged in Expert Criticism gate passage.

off_peak_hours_per_year.rationale: Off-peak studio capacity is missing in the source. Base ~1200h/year assumes ~25h/week off-peak across 48 operating weeks; bounds span 12-37h/week to bracket schedule uncertainty.

drop_in_utilization_rate.rationale: Source flags off-peak rental uptake as speculative; Premortem names a 60%-of-target deficit trigger. Base 0.4 represents partial uptake; low 0.2 the named deficit case; high 0.6 optimistic uptake.
